hooks.notes: Pike-side control attempt escalates at South Third through contractor Bren and report-language capture; Rowan still has no legal standing but now has stronger factual leverage.

Rowan confirms the near response is faced built stone with deadened resonance; archive message identifies the site as a transferred bell foundation with sealed interior access; something below gives a second answering knock.
No advancement; Rowan remains unranked, unsponsored, and blocked by process.
Bren openly pushes a simple-collapse narrative while Pell resists and forces district-copy language naming a secondary void or faced obstruction.
Mara Arl enters directly; Rowan refuses to declare Benn dead and frames false reporting as a way to bury him on paper even if he remains buried in stone.
Lin Vey still absent; no change.

hooks.type: investigate who patched the hidden wall / old works history
hooks.notes: Older work under South Third now ties more concretely to a bell foundation rather than generic civic conduit; public notes remain incomplete.

hooks.type: determine what disturbed the South Third search markers
hooks.notes: Disturbed-marker mystery shifts into exposed structural anomaly: near response is offset from the break, likely older/faced work, but the original disturbance source remains unresolved.

hooks.type: family strain / Elias and household pressure
Disturbed markers from inside South Third
hooks.notes: Adjusted strike produces blunt deadened response, crack opens, and cold air vents from a hidden void; the simple collapse explanation is materially broken.
Nessa successfully finds the shelf line and sends an archive message to Pell, confirming the site classification as a transferred bell foundation with sealed interior access.
Pell acts on Rowan’s warning, overrules Bren’s preferred interpretation, suspends strike notes, and records stronger district language while still withholding the archive slip itself.
Mara agrees to watch clerks, runners, and packet traffic leaving South Third for signs Pike receives site information before district copy.
